name: CI — Tests

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'world-game-app/**'
      - '.github/workflows/ci-test.yml'
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]
    paths:
      - 'world-game-app/**'
      - '.github/workflows/ci-test.yml'

defaults:
  run:
    working-directory: world-game-app

jobs:
  test-api:
    name: API unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.26.1

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: world-game-app/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Build workspace packages
        run: pnpm --filter @repo/db run build

      - name: Run api tests
        run: pnpm --filter api run test
        env:
          SESSION_SECRET: ci-test-secret
          TURSO_DATABASE_URL: file:./ci-test.db

      - name: API test coverage
        run: pnpm --filter api run test:coverage
        env:
          SESSION_SECRET: ci-test-secret
          TURSO_DATABASE_URL: file:./ci-test.db

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: api-coverage
          path: world-game-app/apps/api/coverage/

  test-web:
    name: Web unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      # Pin the browser binaries path inside the workspace so it handles cache permissions cleanly
      PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/.playwright-browsers

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.26.1

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: world-game-app/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      # Cache Playwright browsers based on your pnpm lockfile
      - name: Cache Playwright Browsers
        id: playwright-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ${{ github.workspace }}/.playwright-browsers
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ hashFiles('world-game-app/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}

      # Downloads the Chromium shell binary if the cache misses
      - name: Install Playwright Chromium Binary & OS Libraries
        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: pnpm --filter web exec playwright install chromium --with-deps

      # Installs system libraries if the cache hits, keeping runs under 30 seconds
      - name: Install Missing Linux Graphic Libraries
        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
        run: pnpm --filter web exec playwright install-deps chromium

      - name: Run Web tests
        run: pnpm --filter web run test
        env:
          CI: true

      # The coverage script will still run perfectly right after E2E finishes
      - name: Web test coverage
        run: pnpm --filter web run test:coverage
        env:
          CI: true

      # Playwright HTML reports help debug any unexpected test regressions in CI
      - name: Upload Playwright Failure Reports
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: playwright-html-report
          path: world-game-app/apps/web/playwright-report/
          retention-days: 7

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: web-coverage
          path: world-game-app/apps/web/coverage/

  test-db:
    name: DB package tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.26.1

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: pnpm
          cache-dependency-path: world-game-app/pnpm-lock.yaml

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run DB package tests
        run: pnpm --filter @repo/db run test
